name: daily-fresh fetch: --no-network mode marks status offline-cached when prior cached fetch exists; differs from stale-warn-degraded
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/standards-last-fetch .claude-tdd-pro/standards-cache && echo "2024-01-01T00:00:00Z" > .claude-tdd-pro/standards-last-fetch/x.txt && echo "cached content" > .claude-tdd-pro/standards-cache/x.html && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/freshness-gate.sh" --source-id x --fetch-frequency daily --now 2026-05-13T00:00:00Z --no-network --emit-status "$PWD/status.json" 2>/dev/null && grep "offline-cached" status.json 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
